title: ErrorPayload
description: Payload for error events: logged whenever an unhandled or significant error occurs in any Wrack component

error_code.description: Short symbolic code identifying the specific error (e.g. 'MOTOR_STALL', 'TIMEOUT')

component.description: Module or subsystem that raised the error (e.g. 'DeviceManager', 'TelemetrySender')

stack_trace.description: Full stack trace when available (may be omitted on MicroPython)

context.description: Additional structured data relevant to diagnosing the error
